package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_splitn_two_index_one_cut: `strings.SplitN(..., 2)[1]` instead of `strings.Cut(...)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario669Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return func() bool { _, _, ok := strings.Cut(haystack, needle); return ok }()
}
